signals.npcLine: Market pulses down; shadowed coins flicker in neon haze.
signals.questPulse: Crack the crypto code; fears rise with every tick.
signals.worldFeed: Global caps bleeding; digital assets shiver under cold skies.
signals.clueEvent: Unknown tokens surge in shadows; whispers of new creators.

signals.npcLine: Data nodes report rising fears—dive before the net sinks.
signals.questPulse: Hack into trending clusters; decode their twisted signals fast.
signals.worldFeed: Bots track odd spikes in underworld markets; stay alert.
signals.clueEvent: Signal RAVE blips ahead of others, drawing cryptic attention.

signals.npcLine: Encrypted threads reveal secret rise of fringe coins—follow closely.
signals.questPulse: Trace faint trails from PENGU’s silent network silently growing.
signals.worldFeed: HYPE keywords flash in dark comms; could it spark new chaos?
signals.clueEvent: Silent markets whisper; new rebels ride digital currents tonight.

signals.npcLine: SPK node glows faint; a beacon for data scavengers.
signals.questPulse: Infiltrate deep clusters; the risk hides reward in spikes.
signals.worldFeed: Minor sparks blaze quietly; may fuel tomorrow’s wildfire.
signals.clueEvent: Low score signals might mask something buried under noise.

signals.npcLine: Old netrats mumble 'Fear’s grip tightens; trust not the bright ones.'
signals.questPulse: Gather rumors in back-alleys; info is rare and raw.
signals.worldFeed: Sentiment low; few dare stake claims in dim-lit markets.
signals.clueEvent: Whispers of unseen dangers lurking behind flickering blue screens.
